title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature as a step toward autonomous coding systems, comparing it to Ralph-loop 2.0. The video covers how to set up and use goal-based prompting along with related tools like Crewlet, Superdesign, and features like Goal-buddy and Mission exploration for longer-horizon tasks.
